steps.title: Identify like terms
steps.content: All three terms in the expression $7x^4 + 10x^4 - 10x^4$ contain the factor $x^4$, so they are like terms and can be combined.

steps.title: Combine coefficients
steps.content:
Since all terms are like terms, add and subtract their coefficients:
$$7 + 10 - 10 = 7$$

Therefore, $7x^4 + 10x^4 - 10x^4 = 7x^4$, which means $b = 7$.
